tasks.title: Local technical slice
acceptance: C# solution builds without warnings or errors
8 xUnit tests pass
Python pytest suite passes
Godot headless smoke completes and writes a save
tasks.notes: Not complete until the same code has run in required remote CI.

tasks.title: Strict bootstrap and verification front door
acceptance: A documented doctor command validates exact required tool versions
The required verification command fails when Godot is unavailable
Linux and Windows CI execute all required M0 checks
Failure logs and machine-readable test results are uploaded

tasks.title: Windows workstation bootstrap and local Godot discovery
acceptance: The pinned Git LFS, .NET SDK, uv, and Godot .NET versions are available from Git Bash on Windows
The Godot front door discovers a non-admin WinGet Godot .NET installation when no command alias exists
Windows setup and verification commands are documented without changing the selected toolchain
The complete M0 gate passes locally on Windows and writes structured reports

tasks.title: Decoupled chase and cockpit camera system
acceptance: The chase camera follows vehicle position and damped heading without inheriting rigid-body pitch, roll, suspension shake, or instantaneous steering rotation
Tunable follow distance, height, look-ahead, yaw damping, recenter delay, and speed response preserve a stable horizon and readable road sightline from rest through the declared high-speed target
Camera collision avoidance prevents terrain, barrier, sign, vehicle-body, and streamed-geometry clipping without abrupt zoom oscillation
The cockpit camera remains vehicle-local while bounded stabilization, look controls, and transitions between cockpit and chase preserve steering continuity and speed readability

Reset, collision, grade changes, route transitions, local-origin rebases, save-resume, pause, and input-device changes cannot leave either camera detached, inverted, occluded, or pointed away from the drivable path
Deterministic official-engine scenarios, stable semantic automation state, and renderer captures make camera lag, horizon error, occlusion, clipping, and mode transitions reviewable

human_gate.name: Cockpit and chase camera comfort and readability review

tasks.notes: P0-017 owns camera behavior and the vehicle integration seam. P1-008 supplies stable visual camera anchors and must coordinate edits to CannonballVehicle.cs and game/Automation/VehicleVisualScenario.cs while either task is active; P0-017 may change only camera selection and camera-contract assertions in the shared visual scenario. Production vehicle art is not required because the graybox vehicle must satisfy the same camera contract.

tasks.title: Keyboard and controller input conditioning

allowed_work: engine-independent input conditioning and profile tests
stationary hold and input-state safety behavior
official-engine semantic automation and renderer captures
completion_blocked_by: P0-017 human camera comfort and readability gate
excluded_claims: P0-018 completion before P0-017 is complete
physical wheel, pedal, or force-feedback readiness

acceptance: Keyboard steering ramps in, returns, and changes direction without full-lock snaps while controller steering uses a configurable deadzone, response curve, and rate limit
Throttle, service brake, reverse, and handbrake inputs remain distinct and support keyboard buttons plus independent controller axes without sticky or contradictory states
Speed-sensitive steering reduces excessive high-speed authority while preserving useful low-speed maneuvering and never rotates the camera directly
A stationary hold prevents uncommanded rollback or creep at the route start and on supported grades while releasing predictably for intentional throttle or reverse
Accessible, Balanced, and Raw profiles expose deterministic, bounded input-conditioning values and persist their selected profile through save-resume
Focus loss, pause, controller disconnect and reconnect, device switching, reset, and save-resume clear or reconstruct input state without unintended acceleration, braking, or steering
Official-engine automation reports raw and conditioned inputs, response timing, saturation, device source, and active profile through stable semantic state
tasks.notes: Implementation may proceed against the merged and verified P0-017 camera foundation while its human comfort gate remains pending. P0-018 cannot be marked complete until P0-017 is complete. The single ChaseCameraRig.cs reset-snap edit is coordinated under P0-017's broader game/Camera/ ownership and does not transfer camera behavior ownership to P0-018. Physical steering wheels, pedals, and force feedback remain governed by Q-006 and are deliberately outside this keyboard-and-controller baseline.

tasks.title: High-speed vehicle dynamics and assist tuning
acceptance: Raycast suspension, tire lateral and longitudinal grip, braking, drag, downforce, center of mass, yaw stabilization, and rollover resistance are tuned as one coherent model from rest through at least 200 mph
Accessible, Balanced, and Raw profiles are materially distinct, deterministic, documented, and bounded; assists preserve player intent instead of steering an invisible route-following car

Steering response, stopping distance, lateral acceleration, slip angle, yaw rate, chassis pitch and roll, suspension travel, wheel contact, and recovery time stay within declared bands at cruise, push, and redline speeds

Representative grades, curves, lane transitions, shoulders, gore areas, barriers, road departure and re-entry, spins, collisions, and reset recovery do not produce unexplained launches, tunneling, permanent oscillation, or unrecoverable control state
Vehicle state remains equivalent across frame-rate bands, stream transitions, local-origin rebases, save-resume, and deterministic replay within declared tolerances
The implementation remains a forgiving high-speed game model and does not expand into simulation-grade drivetrain, tire-carcass, thermal, or crash-reconstruction scope
tasks.notes: Quantitative bands must be recorded before tuning is declared complete so acceptance cannot be moved to match a preferred result.

tasks.title: Handling validation corpus and sustained play sessions
acceptance: Checksum-locked scenarios cover launch and stop, sustained straight-line speed, sweepers, decreasing-radius curves, grades, lane changes, merges, exits, transfers, road departure and re-entry, barrier contact, spins, rollover risk, reset, and save-resume
Keyboard and controller traverse every scenario under Accessible, Balanced, and Raw profiles at cruise, push, and redline speed bands with deterministic seeds and declared metric tolerances

Machine-readable evidence records input latency and response, camera horizon and occlusion, speed and path error, slip, yaw, roll, stopping distance, wheel contact, collision misses, reset count, frame-time percentiles, and replay divergence
Renderer captures make the worst quantitative result and every safety-critical scenario visually reviewable from chase, cockpit, and diagnostic cameras

A human completes separate uninterrupted 30-minute keyboard and controller sessions and records comfort, camera readability, steering precision, braking confidence, recovery, assist usefulness, fatigue, and motion-sickness findings
No unresolved control-blocking, camera-discomfort, unexplained-instability, or route-readability finding remains when the M0 handling gate is approved
tasks.notes: This task owns closure evidence for the M0 handling gate first declared by P0-006. Agents may prepare deterministic evidence and review materials but cannot approve the human sessions.

tasks.title: Correct deterministic geodata record emission
acceptance: Edge IDs remain paired with their source IDs and geometries after sorting
Reversed input feature order produces equivalent semantic output
Topology uses a multigraph and preserves legitimate parallel directed edges
Endpoint topology and emitted geometry cannot create seam gaps
verification: uv run --project tools/map_pipeline ruff check tools/map_pipeline

tasks.title: Locked public-domain source acquisition and elevation
acceptance: Manifest source IDs, publishers, URLs, and licenses are enforced against the catalog
NHPN acquisition paginates in stable order, resumes, retries, deduplicates, and reconciles expected counts
3DEP acquisition locks an explicit product and exact artifacts for a route corridor
Rebuilds from the acquisition lockfile perform no discovery and fail on hash drift
Elevation, grade, CRS, and horizontal and vertical datums survive into packaged content
verification: uv run --project tools/map_pipeline cannonball-map validate-lock data/sources/source-lock.json

tasks.title: Sharded route packaging and runtime streaming
acceptance: The root route index is under 64 MB
Each runtime chunk is under 16 MB and independently hashed
Missing and corrupt chunks are rejected before use
The game streams packaged chunks instead of the procedural RoadMath corridor
A committed official-source fixture passes pipeline-to-C#-to-Godot integration
A corrected short-fixture render-integrity capture keeps roadway, terrain, and scenery reviewable while all four chunks are loaded
A longer locked representative corridor capture passes the human geographic sanity review

tasks.title: Exact save, resume, and recovery
acceptance: Runtime load reconstructs authoritative route, origin, vehicle, elapsed time, systems, and stream state
The checksum covers the actual route package
Thousands of seeded save points reload to equivalent authoritative state
Interrupted, corrupt, and previous-version saves recover or fail with an actionable result

tasks.title: Deterministic long-route scenario runner
acceptance: Scenario inputs include route package, seed, assist profile, target distance, save points, and expected completion
Evidence reports seams, route transitions, rebases, maximum local coordinate, frame-time and chunk-build percentiles, memory growth, collision misses, and resume equivalence
A 500-mile Linux and Windows traversal has zero missing chunks, hash failures, road gaps, and save divergence
All three assist profiles have deterministic regression scenarios
tasks.notes: P0-006 supplies deterministic long-route infrastructure. P0-020 owns the dedicated handling corpus, sustained human sessions, and closure evidence for this M0 gate.

tasks.title: Reproducible unsigned desktop exports

allowed_work: Linux and Windows release export scripts
immutable internal CI artifacts and rollback rehearsal

acceptance: CI installs exact Godot 4.7.1 export templates
Linux and Windows packages are produced from checked-in presets
Each package passes a clean-machine launch smoke
Each package has checksums, tool versions, source revision, content hashes, and an SBOM
Artifact promotion is immutable and rollback is documented

tasks.title: Remote authority and protected integration
acceptance: The implementation is committed and required workflows pass remotely
Main requires the declared CI checks
Delivery tasks have dependency and evidence records
Concurrent tasks declare generated-output ownership before work begins

tasks.title: Visual and collision streaming separation
acceptance: Only the declared near-player window carries collision
Visual lookahead remains available through the declared time-to-arrival horizon
Chunk work respects the measured frame-time and build-latency budgets

tasks.title: Modern PlayGodot semantic UI automation spike
acceptance: The bridge runs on unmodified official Godot 4.7.1 on macOS, Linux, and Windows
Interactive Control nodes expose unique stable automation IDs and normalized semantic state
The protocol supports bounded tree inspection, signal waits, input, and node or viewport screenshots
Transport binds only to loopback on an ephemeral port and requires a per-run token and version handshake
Mutation and method calls are absent by default or constrained by explicit capability allowlists
Malformed, oversized, unauthenticated, timed-out, and disallowed requests fail closed with transcripts
Release packages prove that no enabled PlayGodot server or rendezvous surface is present
The spike measures unique defect coverage, flake rate, execution time, and diagnosis cost against CLI plus Computer Use

tasks.title: Deterministic asset and provenance pipeline
acceptance: The exact Blender build, export scripts, glTF profile, and Godot 4.7.1 import settings are pinned and invokable without an interactive editor

Machine-readable manifests recursively record content hashes, authorship, license, acquisition or creation date, transformations, export profile, and redistribution status for every source and derived asset
Headless Blender lint and export enforce portable paths, semantic naming, scale, axes, transforms, import profiles, LOD, collision, materials, textures, and declared performance budgets
Official-engine headless import instantiates project-owned wrapper scenes, resolves required semantic nodes, and proves release exports do not depend on Blender or test-only automation
Deterministic renderer-backed contact sheets and representative scene captures are produced with structured inventory, budget, hash, and comparison evidence
Graybox fallbacks satisfy the same semantic contracts so code, tests, and source builds remain available when production art is absent
tasks.notes: ADR-0012 is authoritative. Computer Use is supplementary visual evidence and PlayGodot is not required for 3D asset export or promotion.

tasks.title: Conditional independent immutable-source recovery replica
acceptance: An independent provider, retention policy, access model, and cost boundary are recorded in an ADR
S3 Versioning and a bucket-level 365-day COMPLIANCE Object Lock default are verified through provider APIs, every upload inherits retention, and a permanent version-delete attempt is denied
Every authoritative GitHub Release source asset is replicated and inventoried by content hash, byte count, S3 key, version ID, provider checksum, storage class, and retain-until timestamp
Separate least-privilege replication, catalog-signing, retention-steward, restoration, and drill-evidence roles use short-lived or AWS-native identities and none can bypass or shorten retention
The accepted catalog is signed outside the replication writer's authority and its public key, catalog hash, and exact version ID are anchored in the out-of-band recovery pointer
An AWS-native retention steward extends every version under the protected source, catalog, recovery-kit, and drill prefixes in a drill that runs with GitHub and Vercel unavailable
A Vercel OIDC observer with no write access reports version, checksum, retention-horizon, drill-freshness, and heartbeat status
The locked replica contains its own inventory, manifest schema, restore tooling, and infrastructure snapshot

Two human-controlled locations hold an out-of-band pointer with the AWS account, region, bucket, bootstrap key/version, restore role, independent credential-custody procedure, catalog anchor, and first CLI command
A destructive drill initiated outside GitHub restores locked source artifacts without GitHub Releases, Vercel, upstream public URLs, or local and CI caches

The drill writes evidence to a unique run-ID and content-hash key through a prefix-limited role; prior versions and source or catalog objects cannot be altered or deleted and consumers use the exact evidence version ID
The restored bytes, recursive manifests, and source-lock hashes match the authoritative records
A deterministic pre-upload estimate covers storage, requests, retrieval, and the full retention commitment and blocks publication above the unapproved cost boundary
Actual monthly cost and configured USD 5 and USD 10 budget alerts are recorded

human_gate.name: Recovery provider, credentials, and spending approval

activation.mandatory_when: Before retaining source material that is unique, privately licensed, legally critical, expensive to reconstruct, or no longer reliably reacquirable
activation.may_activate_when: The project owner explicitly approves the additional recovery plane early

tasks.notes: ADR-0010 defers provisioning and removes this task from the release-critical path. If activated, ADR-0009 remains the implementation design and completion still requires credentials, spending approval, provisioning, replication, and a destructive restore drill.

tasks.title: Primary immutable GitHub source publication
acceptance: Every authoritative source-lock artifact is mapped to a content-addressed immutable GitHub Release asset
Oversized assets are deterministically split and reconstruct from a checksum-verified manifest
The complete draft release is independently downloaded and verified before immutable publication
Published release tags and assets are immutable and carry checksums, provenance, and attestations
A clean environment reconstructs every retained source and matches source-lock hashes without local or CI caches
Every source is classified against ADR-0010 before authoritative publication, and publication fails when a mandatory P1-005 trigger is present without complete P1-005 evidence
tasks.notes: ADR-0006 remains release-critical. ADR-0010 defers only the independent AWS/Vercel recovery replica, not primary immutable GitHub source publication. Published immutable release source-lock-v1-9a8a9aa07bc8e4f2 on 2026-07-19.

tasks.title: Versioned route semantics and lane-topology contract
acceptance: A versioned schema models ordered non-overlapping distance-bounded lane sections within a stable route edge, including lane widths, lane roles and allowed maneuvers, shoulders, signed direction, and provenance or authored-override ancestry

Explicit lane-to-lane junction connectors declare continuation, merge, split, exit, entrance, and highway-transfer movements, and validation rejects gaps, orphan lanes, impossible crossings, and ambiguous successors
Route identity and concurrency, named or numbered exits, destinations, services, milepoint anchors, and roadside marker records survive the offline-to-runtime package boundary
Content-addressed simplified map geometry retains stable node and edge associations, deterministic levels of detail, and an enforced root and package size budget without loading runtime road meshes
Legacy saves and packages either migrate route position and lane deterministically or fail with an actionable compatibility result
A representative semantics fixture builds twice to byte-identical shipping FlatBuffers and equivalent normalized GeoPackage content
verification: uv run --project tools/map_pipeline pytest -k 'lane or junction or exit or marker or route_identity'
tasks.notes: ADR-0011 and ADR-0017 are authoritative. Q-017 and Q-018 were resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23 as Option A: route context uses checksum-locked authoritative public records first and deterministic authored overlays with recursive provenance for documented gaps; every signed concurrent identity remains authoritative, the locally primary designation renders roadside, and all identities remain available in map and inspection surfaces. Checksum-locked representative fixtures may prove individual semantics, but no fixture result may be presented as continental completion.

tasks.title: Variable-lane road and junction generation
acceptance: Road width, lane centers, markings, shoulders, barriers, gore areas, and collision follow lane-section changes without visible or physical discontinuities
Lane additions, lane drops, merges, splits, exit-only lanes, entrance ramps, and highway-transfer connectors remain drivable at the declared high-speed regression target
Lane and collision continuity holds across stream-chunk boundaries, branch prewarming, eviction, and local-origin rebases
Measured mesh and collision generation remains inside the separately declared visual and collision budgets
Deterministic captures make every transition form reviewable from driving and elevated diagnostic cameras

tasks.title: Interchange routing, transfers, and branch streaming
acceptance: Graph queries expose legal through, exit, entrance, and highway-transfer choices with stable maneuver and destination metadata
Navigation choice prewarms every probable outgoing branch before the decision point and evicts unchosen branches without a frame stall, collision miss, or package-hash failure
The player and deterministic route walker can remain on the current highway, take an exit, and transfer between named highways through at least diamond and directional or cloverleaf fixtures
Overpass elevation, ramp directionality, parallel carriageways, and reconnecting ramps never create invalid shortcuts or self-intersections
Save and resume before, inside, and after an interchange reconstruct the same authoritative edge, lane connector, route plan, and branch stream state

tasks.title: Mile markers, exit signs, and route-context rendering
acceptance: Mile markers display the correct route identity, signed direction, and route-reference milepoint rather than cumulative trip progress

Direction-specific numbering, jurisdiction resets, route concurrency, discontinuities, and missing exact source data produce deterministic non-contradictory results with visible provenance in audit artifacts
Exit and transfer signs show stable exit numbers or suffixes, route shields, destinations, lane guidance, and service context from semantic package records
Marker and sign placement is deterministic, collision-free, readable at the declared approach speeds, and streamed without objectionable pop-in
Automated captures cover ordinary mile markers, a numbering reset, concurrent routes, an exit-only lane, and a highway transfer

tasks.title: Representative lane and interchange validation corpus
acceptance: Checksum-locked fixtures cover divided highway, lane addition and drop, merge and split, exit and entrance, overpass, parallel edge, route concurrency, milepoint reset, and at least two highway-transfer forms
Every supported path passes continuity, curvature, grade, sightline, self-intersection, lane-connection, route-completion, sign-consistency, and save-resume validation
The corpus records which semantics came from approved public-domain sources, deterministic derivation, or authored override and preserves recursive ancestry
A bot traverses every legal fixture path and rejects every intentionally invalid topology mutation
Human review confirms that elevated topology captures and driving captures are geographically plausible and make route decisions understandable

human_gate.name: Representative interchange and route-context geographic review

tasks.title: Directed carriageway and road-marking contract
acceptance: Route schema 5 distinguishes divided carriageways, one-way ramps, true one-way roadways, and unclassified source records without placing opposing traffic in one lane ribbon
Every divided carriageway has one distinct reciprocal opposing edge in the same stable carriageway group, while non-divided edges cannot declare a pairing
The offline pipeline preserves explicit source or authored pairing, rejects missing or ambiguous relationships, content-addresses the contract, and does not infer a pair from proximity
Rendered directed roadways use a yellow left or median edge, white same-direction lane dividers, a white right edge, and white right-side gore or channelization markings
A representative paired-carriageway fixture and adversarial mutations validate serialization, runtime loading, directionality, marking semantics, and traffic-facing lookup
The schema, pipeline, official-engine headless scenario, deterministic renderer capture, and full repository checks pass
tasks.notes: ADR-0014 is authoritative. Q-026 was resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23 as Option A: the first complete corridor proves divided mainlines and one-way ramps; explicit undivided two-way cross-sections follow later under P1-011. P1-009 retains final visual-quality approval.

tasks.title: Layered deterministic highway traffic director
acceptance: A deterministic macro flow and spawn schedule resolves into bounded near-player traffic before it becomes relevant and reconstructs identically after save/resume
Same-direction agents occupy only legal lanes on the active directed edge; opposing agents occupy only the validated reciprocal carriageway and never share the player's lane ribbon
Density, composition, speed distributions, lane intent, indicators, merges, exits, entrances, transfers, incidents, and gap acceptance remain readable at the declared high-speed target
Far traffic uses pooled or instanced representations and only near traffic receives physics, with measured update, memory, tunneling, and collision-substep budgets
Traffic survives streaming, branch prewarm/eviction, local-origin rebases, route changes, compression modes, and exact save/resume without teleporting into unsafe sightlines
Adversarial scenarios cover missing carriageway pairs, ramps, lane drops, interchanges, stopped vehicles, maximum closing speed, degraded quality, and deterministic replay

human_gate.name: High-speed traffic readability, fairness, and density review

tasks.notes: ADR-0014 governs directionality. Q-026 was resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23 as Option A: this task proves divided-carriageway and one-way-road traffic first; undivided two-way behavior is deferred to dependent P1-011 and must not be inferred from spatial proximity. Q-010 was resolved as Option A: tune traffic and incident pacing toward a meaningful decision every few minutes on average while preserving deliberate quiet stretches. Traffic starts only after P0-020 proves the camera, input, and vehicle-dynamics baseline so traffic tuning does not mask or compensate for unresolved driving behavior.

tasks.title: Full-screen trip map and authoritative progress
acceptance: The full-screen map opens from keyboard and controller and renders from simplified immutable graph geometry without depending on loaded road chunks or scene transforms

It shows start, destination, current position, traveled path, planned path, route alternatives, selected service stops, upcoming exits and highway transfers, real distance completed, real distance remaining, and mode-aware estimates

Trip progress follows authoritative graph traversal across edge transitions, detours, transfers, route concurrency, save-resume, and supported compression modes while remaining distinct from displayed mile-marker values
Pan, zoom, recenter, route selection, and exit or service inspection remain bounded and responsive on the continental graph
Interactive controls expose unique stable automation IDs and deterministic semantic state; Core model, official-engine headless input scenarios, and official-engine PlayGodot tests are required
Keyboard and controller focus, scalable text, color-independent route differentiation, and representative-player comprehension pass their declared accessibility and usability gates
The map's pause or live-simulation behavior matches the resolved product decision and is communicated before the player opens it

human_gate.name: Trip-map comprehension and accessibility usability review

tasks.notes: Q-019 was resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23 as Option A: opening the full-screen map in solo play pauses driving and excludes the paused interval from the authoritative run clock. Q-001 was resolved as Option A: 1:1 Endurance is the defining primary experience, while shorter Standard and Challenge modes remain available from the same authoritative route-distance content. P1-004 completed and ADR-0008 activated on 2026-07-19. PlayGodot is required for the trip map's interactive rendered UI, while Core models and official-engine scenarios remain authoritative for route and simulation behavior and Computer Use remains the black-box visual layer. The first-pass authoritative projection, Godot overlay, official-engine scenario, rendered UI automation, and review capture were implemented at c98b78336f7e6d98576a9523952961bd1ed18d9d. The subsequent machine closeout adds indexed semantic lookups, point-budgeted LOD selection, batched path rendering, a deterministic 3,000-mile scale scenario, and data-driven 1:1, fixed-ratio, and selective-cruise estimates that preserve authoritative route distance. Q-028 human usability approval remains required before completion.

tasks.title: Production-ready rigged hero vehicle
acceptance: One original fictional grand tourer passes the ADR-0012 source, license, export, import, semantic-node, and budget contracts with declared LODs and collision proxy
Stable chassis, wheel, suspension, contact, camera, light, exhaust, driver, material, and damage anchors resolve through a project-owned wrapper scene after a clean re-export and reimport
The visual rig follows authoritative steering, wheel rotation, measured suspension travel, and chassis motion without changing the custom raycast physics or save state
Cockpit and chase cameras preserve visibility, speed readability, and mirror or body occlusion bounds across representative steering, grade, collision, and local-origin scenarios
Deterministic contact sheets and driving captures cover daylight, night, braking, steering lock, full suspension travel, LOD transitions, damage-zone highlighting, and graybox fallback equivalence
A clean source checkout can validate and export the vehicle without an interactive Blender or Godot editor session

human_gate.name: Hero vehicle art direction and final rights approval

tasks.notes: Q-020 was resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23 as Option A: develop the project-original Hero GT and existing semantic rig into the production vehicle. The acquisition and ownership direction is closed, but the procedural baseline cannot close final art direction until production modeling, materials, interior, animation, damage presentation, renderer budgets, rights evidence, and human visual approval pass. P0-017 owns camera behavior and P0-019 owns vehicle-dynamics behavior; P1-008 supplies stable visual anchors and presentation without changing those systems. Coordinate CannonballVehicle.cs and game/Automation/VehicleVisualScenario.cs edits while these tasks overlap; P0-017 may change camera selection and camera-contract assertions there, while P1-008 retains visual-stage and asset-presentation ownership.

tasks.title: Modular production highway visual kit
acceptance: A modular kit covers pavement states, shoulders, medians, barriers, guardrails, bridges, overpasses, gore treatments, lane markings, reflectors, signs, posts, and representative roadside furniture

A dedicated signage quality pass replaces placeholder shields and generic copy with jurisdiction-appropriate shield silhouettes, information hierarchy, type scale and weight, spacing, lane arrows, service icons, retroreflective day and night materials, and realistic placement while preserving stable semantic node IDs

Procedural generation remains authoritative and applies the kit continuously across variable lane counts, auxiliary and exit-only lanes, ramps, merges, splits, transfers, curvature, grade, stream boundaries, and local-origin rebases
Materials, decals, markings, signs, and modular meshes preserve scale, orientation, UV density, semantic placement, and collision separation under every representative topology fixture
LOD, instancing, shared-material, texture-residency, draw-call, and pop-in budgets pass both daylight and night high-speed approaches without reducing route-context readability
Deterministic elevated and driving captures cover ordinary highway, lane addition and drop, entrance and exit, gore, bridge or overpass, and two highway-transfer forms
Graybox road assets remain selectable through the same generator contract for fast headless and diagnostic scenarios

human_gate.name: Highway art readability, visual quality, and final rights approval

tasks.notes: Q-024 was resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23 as Option A: production roads, signs, markings, barriers, structures, and roadside assets pursue contemporary, state-specific American highway realism along the actual route, with Colorado retained only as the first researched technical baseline. Q-017 and Q-018 require authoritative public route-context sources with deterministic provenanced overlays for gaps, locally primary roadside designations, and complete concurrency in map and inspection surfaces. The project-original procedural kit remains the autonomous foundation: production and graybox profiles, shared materials and meshes, route-context signage, reflectors, barriers, guardrails, topology/gore regression, a fixture-derived bridge deck and overpass opening, local-origin-safe structure placement, and deterministic daylight/night review stages. Production terrain and furniture, exact jurisdiction-specific sign typography and silhouettes, full renderer budgets, rights records, and representative readability captures remain open; the task must not be marked complete from fixture evidence alone.

tasks.title: Regional terrain and background environment
acceptance: The selected representative region composes deterministic near-road terrain and objects, streamed regional midground, and low-cost distant terrain or skyline from route region and stable seed
Terrain blending, cuts, fills, bridge approaches, vegetation, structures, skyline, weather, and lighting conceal chunk boundaries without altering authoritative route elevation or collision

Near collision, visual lookahead, midground retention, distant backgrounds, and degradation order have separate measured budgets and remain stable through maximum-speed travel and local-origin rebases
Instancing, shared materials, texture residency, occlusion, and LOD transitions remain within the ratified target-hardware budgets while preserving road and sign readability
Deterministic captures cover mountain, foothill, plains, urban-edge, dawn, day, night, weather, stream-boundary, and degraded-quality states with no exposed voids or persistent pop-in
A graybox environment profile remains available for fast validation and produces equivalent route, collision, streaming, and save semantics

human_gate.name: Representative-region art direction, readability, and final rights approval

tasks.notes: Q-021 was resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23: production scenery pursues grounded realism for every traversed state with route-specific subregion profiles where the real environment changes; Colorado remains the representative technical slice rather than the coast-to-coast art template. Q-022 Option A selected a Ryzen 9 5900X / RTX 3080 Ti 12 GB / 64 GB Windows 11 PC as the first reference measurement machine, but exact production budgets remain open until representative captures are ratified. Runtime integration owns only collision-free environment siblings, environment scenario flags, scenario-script routing, continuous terrain ribbons outside the authoritative road margin, and measured environment geometry budgets; authoritative road elevation, road collision, and vehicle physics remain outside this task.

tasks.title: Undivided two-way highway cross-sections and opposing traffic
acceptance: A superseding route and cross-section contract represents opposing travel directions, centerlines, shoulders, passing restrictions, turn pockets, and junction connectivity without placing opposing agents in one directed lane collection
Approved source or authored semantics determine lane direction, passing zones, centerline markings, speed context, and intersection control; runtime proximity never invents opposing flow

Traffic, collision, recovery, routing, save-resume, and trip-map behavior remain deterministic across head-on approach, following, passing, intersection, road-departure, and route-transition scenarios
Procedural generation and the production highway kit cover representative rural US and state highways, transitions to divided facilities, bridges, services, and jurisdiction-specific markings
Machine-readable safety metrics and deterministic renderer captures validate sight distance, closing speed, lane containment, collision tunneling, spawn separation, signage, and day/night readability
The existing divided-carriageway, one-way-ramp, and graybox paths preserve their behavior and validation coverage

human_gate.name: Undivided-highway safety, readability, and route-authenticity review

tasks.notes: Q-026 was resolved by the owner on 2026-07-23 as Option A. This task is intentionally dependency-blocked until the divided-carriageway traffic and M0 handling foundations complete. It requires a new explicit bidirectional cross-section decision and must not retrofit opposing traffic into ADR-0014 directed lane collections.

tasks.title: Signed public release promotion
acceptance: Signed or notarized packages pass clean-machine installation and launch
Release checksums, SBOM, provenance, migration evidence, and rollback artifacts are published
Production credentials are isolated in an approval-gated environment
Every distributed NHPN and USGS 3DEP artifact matches its locked checksum and recursive provenance
Release materials include source credit and a no-endorsement statement and contain no agency logos

human_gate.name: Signing credentials, store submission, and public release approval

tasks.notes: Blocked until a release channel is decided and credentials are provisioned by a human.
